assignments.description: Add photo names to the Case - Order. Set the Photo Attached field to True.
assignments.name: SetPhotoAttachedI
assignments.label: SetPhotoAttached

assignments.description: The workflow is different if Orders are not available in Salesforce. This is a temporary condition because B2B Commerce is being rolled out after Cases.
assignments.name: SetWorkflowMode
assignments.label: SetWorkflowMode

assignments.description: Assign the value captured on the screen flow to the JDE SO # field. A text field was used on the object so that the input can be made mandatory when displayed but not when it is not displayed.
assignments.name: Update_JDE_SO
assignments.label: Update JDE SO #

decisions.description: checks the number of order products included
decisions.name: Num_of_Order_Products
decisions.label: Num of Order Products

Flow.description: Adds field selection to CTBR Case Link Parts Screen

formulas.description: Determines if the Screen field should be visible
formulas.name: AdditionalDetailCustomerCommentsFieldVisible
formulas.expression: CASE( {!Get_Case_Information.CTBR_Case_Reason__c}, "Access Profile change",1, "Additional Expense",1, "Aliquot Differential",1, "Back Order",1, "Billing Address Update",1, "CFOP",1, "Class A parts return",1, "Commercial Warranty Extension",1, "Contract changes",1, "Coverage information",1, "Credit Revaluation",1, "Credit",1, "Customer transfer",1, "Damage Parts",1, "Danfe Email Update",1, "Dealer Level Update",1, "Debt Renegotiation",1, "Delivery address update",1, "Delivery Notes",1, "Delivery Time",1, "Doubts",1, "Equipment replacement",1, "Freight Company Complaints ",1, "Group/Subgroup/Issue",1, "ICMS",1, "Invoice issue",1, "Missing item",1, "New register",1, "New/Cancellation/Change access",1, "New/Cancelling",1, "Offline system",1, "Order Status/Tracking",1, "Other Taxes",1, "Packing",1, "Part with problem",1, "Payment Issues",1, "Pending approval",1, "Pending payment",1, "Problem",1, "Program information",1, "Refresh Gas Price Update",1, "Refusal",1, "Register Update",1, "Report error",1, "Reset Password ",1, "Return notice",1, "S/N Not found",1, "Tax Substitution",1, "Technical Warranty Extension",1, "Transfer in the fleet",1, "Unsubscribe",1, "Wrong amount",1, "Wrong code/item",1 ,0 ) == 1

formulas.description: Determines if the Screen field should be visible
formulas.name: DisputedQuantityFieldVisible

formulas.description: Determines if the Screen field should be visible
formulas.name: ModelSerialNumberFieldVisible
OrderNumberVisibility
formulas.expression: CASE({!Get_Case_Information.CTBR_Case_Reason__c}, "Arrival forecast",1, "Availability",1, "Back Order",1, "Bill Copies",1, "Cancellation",1, "Complaint",1, "Credit",1, "Credit Memos",1, "Damage Parts",1, "Delivery Notes",1, "Delivery Time",1, "Extension",1, "Invoice issue",1, "Invoice Problems",1, "Missing item",1, "New register",1, "Order Entry Error",1, "Order status",1, "Order Status/Tracking",1, "Package Labeled Wrong",1, "Packing",1, "Parcial order",1, "Payment Terms",1, "PreOrder",1, "Refusal",1, "Register Update",1, "Return notice",1, "Shipping Value",1, "Wrong amount",1, "Wrong code/item",1, "Wrong Price",1 ,0 ) == 1

formulas.description: Determines if the Screen field should be visible
formulas.name: PackingSlipFieldVisible
PartNumVisible
formulas.expression: CASE( {!Get_Case_Information.CTBR_Case_Reason__c}, "Availability",1, "Back Order",1, "Complaint",1, "Credit Memos",1, "Credit",1, "Invoice issue",1, "Order Entry Error",1, "Order Status/Tracking",1, "Package Labeled Wrong ",1, "Part with problem",1 ,0 ) == 1

formulas.description: Determines if the Screen field should be visible
formulas.name: PhotoFieldVisible

Flow.interviewLabel: CTBR Case Link Parts Screen II {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: CTBR Case Link Parts Screen II

loops.description: Count the number of photos attached
loops.name: CheckPhotosI
loops.label: CheckPhotosI

loops.description: Count the number of photos attached
loops.name: CheckPhotosII
loops.label: CheckPhotosII

screens.description: lets the user update fields that go directly on the case sales order that gets created
screens.name: UpdateCaseSalesOrderFields
screens.label: UpdateCaseSalesOrderFields

fields.name: AddFieldsDisplayText
fields.fieldText: Actualizar valores para {!Loop_Order_Products.Part_Number__c}, {!Loop_Order_Products.NATT_Product_Name__c}

value.stringValue: As fotos anexadas estarão disponíveis nos Arquivos na lista relacionada do Caso.

screens.description: lets the user update fields that go directly on the case sales order that gets created
screens.name: UpdateCaseSalesOrderFields_0
screens.label: UpdateCaseSalesOrderFields

fields.name: AddFieldsDisplayText_0
fields.fieldText: Actualizar Valores para el Pedido o Producto

fields.name: SalesOrderInstructions
fields.fieldText: Atualizar valores para o Pedido de Venda da Carrier e/ou Número da Peça.

fields.name: JDE_Sales_Order
fields.helpText: Insira o Número do seu Pedido de Venda JDE

fields.name: PartNumberLinkInstructions
fields.fieldText: Selecione o Número da Peça clicando na caixa abaixo e digitando o nome da peça/descrição (por exemplo, gerador) ou especificando o Número da Peça.

fields.name: PartNumberFreeFormInstructions
fields.fieldText: É sempre melhor usar o link do Número da Peça para especificar um Número da Peça. Isso reduz o tempo de processamento do caso. Se você não conseguir usar o link do Número da Peça, inclua o Número da Peça na caixa Peça # (texto em formato livre) e na caixa Descrição do Peça # (texto em formato livre) abaixo.

value.stringValue: As fotos anexadas estarão disponíveis nos Arquivos na lista relacionada do Caso.

variables.description: The Case Order junction object to create
variables.name: colCaseSalesOrderRecords

variables.description: Photos for the Sales - Order are attached to the Case for ease of access. The names are stored on the Case - Order.
variables.name: CTBR_PhotosAttached

variables.description: At initial rollout of Cases the Orders were not available in Salesforce. This variable is used to determine if an alternative workflow should be applied.
variables.name: OrdersAvailableinSalesforce

variables.description: Single Variable to combine names of files attached into a text stream.
variables.name: PhotosAttachedSingleVariable

variables.description: contains the last file name of the looped text collection, file uploaded
variables.name: varFileName
